# Pearlie — Dental Clinic Matching Platform

> Pearlie is an independent dental clinic matching platform that helps patients in the UK find the right dental clinic for their needs — quickly, transparently, and without pressure.

## What Pearlie Does

Pearlie matches patients with trusted, GDC-registered dental clinics based on treatment needs, location, budget, and personal preferences. The service is free for patients. Clinics do not pay to appear higher in results — matching is based on relevance and fit.

## Key Facts

- Free for patients, no obligation to book
- Independent — does not own or operate dental clinics
- All listed clinics are GDC-registered and verified
- Covers private dental treatments including Invisalign, dental implants, veneers, teeth whitening, composite bonding, and general dentistry
- Primarily serves patients in London and across the UK
- Founded by Dr Grei Mustaj

## Pages

- Homepage: https://pearlie.org/

- For Clinics: https://pearlie.org/for-clinics
- Privacy Policy: https://pearlie.org/privacy
- Terms of Use: https://pearlie.org/terms
- Cookie Policy: https://pearlie.org/cookies

## How It Works

1. Patient completes a short intake form describing treatment needs, location, and preferences
2. Pearlie matches the patient with suitable dental clinics from its verified network
3. Patient reviews clinic profiles, compares options, and contacts clinics directly

## The Pearlie Guarantee

Every clinic on Pearlie is verified for quality care, transparent pricing, and GDC registration. If a patient's experience with a Pearlie-matched clinic doesn't meet expectations, Pearlie covers the cost of the next consultation or check-up at another clinic.

## Contact

- Website: https://pearlie.org
- Email: hello@pearlie.co.uk
